steps.title: Translate to equations and equate
steps.content:
$a$ is $230\%$ of $b$ gives $a = 2.30b$, and $a$ is $60\%$ of $c$ gives $a = 0.60c$. Equating and solving for $c$ in terms of $b$:
$$2.30b = 0.60c$$
$$c = \frac{2.30b}{0.60} = \frac{230}{60}b = \frac{23}{6}b$$

steps.title: Find p such that c equals p percent of b
steps.content:
Since $c = \frac{23}{6}b$ and we need $c = \frac{p}{100}b$:
$$\frac{p}{100} = \frac{23}{6}$$
$$p = \frac{23}{6} \times 100 = \frac{2300}{6} = 383.\overline{3}$$
The choice closest to $383.\overline{3}$ is $383$. That confirms D is correct.
